message:
Remove Python FFI tracking and fix JSON cache performance bug

- Remove python_ffi_vars tracking from codegen (no longer needed)
- Fix JSON cache incref loop bug: remove incref from cache hits
  - Cache now owns the value permanently (incref once when storing)
  - Users borrow from cache (no incref/decref overhead in loops)
  - Prevents 70ms overhead from 100k iterations × 2 atomic ops
- Rename python_ffi.zig to c_ffi.zig (preparation for Zig C interop)
- Fix build: change is_python_object from var to const
